data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 4 AC criteria verified: (1) proposals test TOLERATED in suite-engine (exit 0); (2) test file executable; (3) grep -c '^test_' = 8 >= 4; (4) [test_proposal_generation_section_exists] RED marker in .test-index; (5) implementation-plan/SKILL.md mapped to test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh in .test-index.
